title: Trickery
body:
**Trickery is a Halloween-themed mod that adds new content such as candies, The possessed mob, a new villager profession, and a bunch of more things related to the season!**

![All Candies in the mod currently (normal, golden, rotten)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52f68f002af407fc3700e3b26b706a0b289f4ac1.png)

Candies are a new type of food added by the mod, they can be obtained by exchanging with the new **villager profession candy maker** or by defeating a new enemy: **The Beyonder**!

![Glowroot caves candies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a12e47d863f3b2e0a539449bd6bc68fb2535cb26.png)

You can also get glowroot caves candies with a rare chance when defeating The possessed or traded with an wandering trader

![New Effects added by the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da97584eeb8116c564403f08429281f9d8bb85d7.png)

Trading with the candy maker will unlock rarer trades, and at the last level it will be possible to get the **Man Eater Tool Set**, this set of tools eats sweets in the player's inventory to restore durability, basically being infinitely durable tools!

![Man Eater Tool Set](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd28a85657e431661e6301b074ae8c99797f6d52.png)

The mod also adds new candy-related effects such as: Ecstasy, Sweet Rush, Golden Rush and Sweet Poisoning!

**Embark on this adventure and discover all the sweet surprises added by the mod!**
